description_long: This is a modern sniper rifle with a long, cylindrical barrel and an attached suppressor at the muzzle end. The body features a prominent scope mounted on top, suggesting precision targeting capabilities. The stock is robust and ergonomically shaped, likely designed for stability and comfort during extended use. A detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver, indicating quick reload functionality. The rifle also includes a pistol grip and a bipod for steady aiming, both of which are common in tactical and urban sniper scenarios. The overall finish is matte gray, giving it a utilitarian and low-reflectivity appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern sniper rifle with a long barrel, suppressor, scope, and detachable magazine, finished in matte gray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the suppressor, scope, and stock.
description_view_1: Front-angled view highlighting the suppressor, scope, and the bipod beneath the rifle.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the alignment of the barrel, scope, and the overall slim profile.
description_view_3: Rear-angled view focusing on the stock, pistol grip, and the magazine area.
